analysis.what_went_wrong: The entry was made outside the established pipeline with no clear catalysts or risk assessment.
analysis.catalyst_accuracy: No catalysts were recorded, so none materialized.
analysis.agent_assessment: The Quant agent was the most useful, indicating oversold conditions, but ultimately did not lead to a successful trade; the Fundamental agent was least useful due to lack of summary.
analysis.macro_fit: The risk-off macro environment hindered this trade.
analysis.key_learning: Ensure that all trades are supported by clear catalysts and fit within the established pipeline to avoid unplanned entries.
analysis.avoid_repeat: Avoid making trades outside the established pipeline without sufficient justification and risk assessment.
